pub mod zennode::serde_impl
pub mod zennode::traits
pub trait zennode::traits::NodeDef: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeDef::create(&self, &zennode::param::ParamMap) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn zennode::traits::NodeInstance>, zennode::error::NodeError>
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeDef::create_default(&self) -> core::result::Result<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn zennode::traits::NodeInstance>, zennode::error::NodeError>
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeDef::from_kv(&self, &mut zennode::kv::KvPairs) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<alloc::boxed::Box<dyn zennode::traits::NodeInstance>>, zennode::error::NodeError>
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeDef::schema(&self) -> &'static zennode::schema::NodeSchema
pub trait zennode::traits::NodeInstance: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + core::any::Any
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeInstance::as_any(&self) -> &dyn core::any::Any
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeInstance::as_any_mut(&mut self) -> &mut dyn core::any::Any
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeInstance::clone_boxed(&self) -> alloc::boxed::Box<dyn zennode::traits::NodeInstance>
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeInstance::get_param(&self, &str) -> core::option::Option<zennode::param::ParamValue>
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeInstance::is_identity(&self) -> bool
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeInstance::schema(&self) -> &'static zennode::schema::NodeSchema
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeInstance::set_param(&mut self, &str, zennode::param::ParamValue) -> bool
pub fn zennode::traits::NodeInstance::to_params(&self) -> zennode::param::ParamMap

pub fn zennode::NodeInstance::as_any_mut(&mut self) -> &mut dyn core::any::Any

pub fn zennode::NodeInstance::to_params(&self) -> zennode::param::ParamMap
pub trait zennode::NodeParams
pub const zennode::NodeParams::PARAM_KIND: zennode::schema::ParamKind
pub type zennode::ParamMap = alloc::collections::btree::map::BTreeMap<alloc::string::String, zennode::param::ParamValue>
pub type zennode::Phase = zennode::ordering::NodeRole
